code:
fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut count = 0
  if string.is_empty(name)
    result = "empty-name"
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age < 0
    if count > 0
      result = "#{result},negative-age"
    else
      result = "negative-age"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if age > 150
    if count > 0
      result = "#{result},too-old"
    else
      result = "too-old"
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    "ok"
  else
    "errors=#{result}"
  end
end

import string

print(validate("", -5))
print(validate("Alice", 30))
print(validate("Bob", 200))
